name: Bisquick Cherry Fruit Chews
recipeIngredient: 1 Jar (4 oz) Maraschino cherries, drained and chopped (about 1/3 cup)
recipeInstructions: Mix butter, sugar, and eggs; stir in baking mix. Gently fold in nuts, dates, and cherries. Spread dough in a greased oblong pan, 13 x 9 x 2 inches. Bake for 30 minutes at 350°F. Cool slightly and cut into 1 1/2 inch squares. Makes 4 dozen. The book says they are moist and rich bars.
